LINE_BENE_PTB_DDCTBL_AMT for the relevant lines. 

ANES claim lines are a subset of the claims, and a subset of procedures in the Part B carrier data file. 
ANES claims are defined as those with a line BETOS code (BETOS_CD) where the first two digits = “P0” 
and the CARR_LINE_MTUS_CD = “2.” 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: ANES_BENE_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: There are 11 cost/use categories from the carrier Part B and durable medical equipment
